runParameters.timingNormalizationNote: Strict Dawn-vs-Doe operation comparability uses direct timing on the full 200k-draw bundle command (baseline/comparison divisors fixed to 1.0).

workload.comparabilityNotes: Apples-to-apples macro render-bundle contract. This 200k-draw bundle variant replaces the weaker repeated 2k-draw lane for governed Apple Metal compare evidence.
